response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile individual contributor with ~16 years of experience and an excellent match for the role's focus areas: developer tooling (MCP code generators, CI/CD setup, GitLab administration), testing infrastructure (built the Trial test runner and Fluent-Asserts library), and TDD/craftsmanship practices. However, this is a Level II people-management role, and the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership experience — no direct reports, performance reviews, one-on-ones, or organizational roadmap ownership. The required minimum of 2 years people management and 3 years technical leadership in a defined leadership role is not demonstrated, which is the central requirement of the position.
strengths: Deep developer-tools and testing-infrastructure background (custom test runner, assertion library, CI/CD, GitLab) directly matching the role's focus
Broad, senior technical range across web, mobile (iOS/Apple TV), embedded, and high-performance backends with strong craftsmanship (TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing via workshops, dojos, and multi-module courses, suggesting leadership potential
concerns: No evidence of formal people management (direct reports, one-on-ones, performance expectations) required for this role
No clearly scoped technical-leadership or roadmap-ownership role meeting the 3-year minimum
Limited large-mobile-platform-ecosystem depth beyond a single past iOS/Apple TV app
